name: @stackra/notifications
purpose: Enterprise multi-channel notification orchestrator — Web Push, in-app centre, Expo push tokens, permission prompts, analytics fan-out, HeroUI components.
capabilities: Web Push subscription + VAPID key management
HeroUI permission prompt + list + badge components
Testing subpath with in-memory push + centre mocks
when_to_use: Wiring Web Push, in-app centre, and native push tokens for user-facing notifications with permission UX.
when_not_to_use: For system-level toasts use @stackra/ui Toast; for backend fan-out use the notifications backend package.
